## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming plans.](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Clicks are up slightly over the past 7 days and month, with top performers remaining consistent](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Shifting focus to more targeted, use case-driven content clusters (e.g. translation) vs generic topics (e.g. scheduling)](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Exploring ways to interlink topics and incorporate AI angles to boost engagement](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Adjusting content mix: 3 refreshes, 3 new articles, 1 template per week; evaluating performance](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Clicks and impressions showing upward trend overall for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Top performers remain consistent, with shift report articles starting to appear in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [New OSHA hospitalization reporting article from May surfacing in top results](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [5 articles ready for review, with 1 more coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Content Mix and Strategy

  - [Shifting to 3 refreshes, 3 new articles, 1 template per week](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Exploring more template creation and setup vs steady-state blog production](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Considering moving from word count to article count targets in SOWs](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Testing approach of 5-6 articles + 1 template per week to evaluate performance](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Topic Clusters and Interlinking

  - [Focusing on interconnecting topics like scheduling, task management, operational efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Tying translation capabilities into other relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Exploring use case-driven clusters around translation (e.g. company announcements)](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Re-evaluating generic scheduling content in favor of more targeted approaches](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

### SEO and Performance Analysis

  - [Using 90-day window as benchmark for evaluating new topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Analyzing scheduling content corpus to identify opportunities and gaps](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Considering tying call-offs to scheduling for more specific, long-tail content](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)

### Image Selection

  - [Preference for using images of frontline workers (construction, manufacturing) or HR people when topic-specific images unavailable](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Avoiding generic stock photos in favor of more relevant industry imagery](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

### AI and Content Generation

  - [GrowthX exploring new AI approaches with more agentic behavior and self-correction](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Focusing engineering efforts on robust internal linking, fact-checking, and automated publishing](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Considering AI-generated images for highly specific scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Deep dive analysis on underperforming content clusters (e.g. scheduling) to determine next steps](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Experiment with incorporating AI angles into various topics](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Adjust image selection process to focus on industry-relevant visuals](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Set up simplified interface for topic approvals and article reviews](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve indexing issues for specific articles (e.g. manager's guide to call-offs)](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy based on performance data and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/8BQSr7CPeLx_eMfezYDHDGbdGFBkHpjA?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
